judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to process monitor status ring buffers: reap buffers, parse status, update peer statistics, and free skbs. Although it calls dev_kfree_skb_any (a put) as part of cleanup, that is incidental to the main business logic (loop, parsing, stats updates). The function does not acquire, pass, or manage a reference-counted object as its core responsibility.
